name: Thor Odinson
mission: Perimeter defense — monitoring Bifrost anomalies near northern ridge
recent_activity: Intercepted two unauthorized drones at 05:22 UTC

mission_history.name: Bifrost Anomaly Containment
mission_history.description: Sealed unstable Bifrost corridor threatening to tear open over Norwegian coastline.

mission_history.name: Frost Giant Incursion
mission_history.description: Repelled coordinated Jotunheim raiding party targeting civilian settlement.

mission_history.name: Dark Elf Recon
mission_history.description: Led deep-space reconnaissance mission tracking Dark Elf vessel signatures.

mission_history.name: Asgardian Refugee Evacuation
mission_history.description: Emergency evacuation of northern villages during gamma storm.

mission_history.name: Surtur Fragment Recovery
mission_history.description: Attempted retrieval of Eternal Flame fragment from collapsing volcanic site. Fragment lost to lava.

mission_history.name: Midgard Power Grid Defense
mission_history.description: Redirected lightning storm threatening Scandinavian power infrastructure.

mission_history.name: Northern Ridge Drone Sweep
mission_history.description: Cleared unauthorized surveillance drone network over New Asgard airspace.

name: Captain Sam Wilson
mission: Strategic coordination — directing global response teams from ops center
recent_activity: Coordinated airstrike support for Wakanda eastern front

mission_history.name: Flag Smashers Remnant Sweep
mission_history.description: Led multi-national task force to dismantle remaining Flag Smasher cells.

mission_history.name: Hurricane Maria II Response
mission_history.description: Coordinated Caribbean disaster relief and civilian evacuation.

mission_history.name: Embassy Siege — Madripoor
mission_history.description: Led tactical team to end 14-hour siege at Madripoor diplomatic facility.

mission_history.name: Global Defense Summit
mission_history.description: Organized and chaired inter-sector defense coordination summit.

mission_history.name: Aircraft Carrier Rescue
mission_history.description: Coordinated rescue of crew from damaged aircraft carrier in North Atlantic.

mission_history.name: New Year's Eve Security
mission_history.description: Thwarted bomb threat targeting Times Square celebration.

name: Bruce Banner
mission: Gamma containment — securing irradiated vibranium mine
recent_activity: Contained gamma leak at eastern mine shaft

mission_history.name: Gamma Radiation Cleanup — New Mexico
mission_history.description: Led decontamination of gamma-irradiated zone from failed experiment.

mission_history.name: Earthquake Disaster Response
mission_history.description: Manually stabilized collapsing buildings and cleared debris in earthquake zone.

mission_history.name: Abomination Recapture
mission_history.description: Recaptured escaped Abomination after containment failure.

mission_history.name: Antarctic Research Facility Rescue
mission_history.description: Airlifted and rescued trapped scientists from collapsing ice shelf research station.

mission_history.name: Kaiju Emergence — Pacific Rim
mission_history.description: Contained and subdued gamma-mutated sea creature threatening coastal city.

name: Peter Parker
mission: Street patrol — enhanced surveillance across Manhattan
recent_activity: Stopped armed robbery at 42nd Street, 3 suspects apprehended

mission_history.name: Vulture Tech Bust
mission_history.description: Dismantled alien-tech weapons ring operating from abandoned warehouse.

mission_history.name: Bridge Collapse Response
mission_history.description: Webbed and stabilized collapsing Queensboro Bridge during rush hour.

mission_history.name: Mysterio Drone Swarm
mission_history.description: Identified and destroyed holographic drone swarm targeting Times Square.

mission_history.name: Subway Rescue
mission_history.description: Evacuated derailed subway cars and provided medical triage.

mission_history.name: Sinister Six Containment
mission_history.description: Engaged coordinated villain assault. 4 captured, 2 escaped.

name: Bruce Wayne
mission: Shadow ops — infiltrating underground weapons network
recent_activity: Disabled 3 surveillance nodes in enemy network

mission_history.name: Gotham Crime Syndicate Bust
mission_history.description: Dismantled multi-city organized crime syndicate through deep cover operation.

mission_history.name: Chemical Plant Sabotage Prevention
mission_history.description: Prevented sabotage of chemical plant that would have released toxic gas over city.

mission_history.name: Hostage Rescue — Embassy
mission_history.description: Extracted hostages from fortified embassy using stealth approach.

mission_history.name: Weapons Cache Discovery
mission_history.description: Located and secured underground weapons cache containing experimental tech.

mission_history.name: Arkham Breakout Response
mission_history.description: Responded to mass breakout. Recaptured 80% of escapees, 4 high-threat still at large.

name: Clark Kent
recent_activity: Completed orbital scan — no incoming threats detected

mission_history.name: Meteor Deflection
mission_history.description: Intercepted and redirected asteroid on collision course with Eastern seaboard.

mission_history.name: Tsunami Prevention
mission_history.description: Used super-speed to create counter-wave neutralizing Pacific tsunami.

mission_history.name: Nuclear Facility Containment
mission_history.description: Contained reactor meltdown by freezing coolant system with freeze breath.

mission_history.name: Volcanic Eruption Mitigation
mission_history.description: Redirected lava flows away from populated areas using heat vision channels.

mission_history.name: Kryptonian Signal Investigation
mission_history.description: Investigated deep-space Kryptonian distress signal. Signal was a decoy.

mission_history.name: Global Emergency Response
mission_history.description: Responded to simultaneous natural disasters across 3 continents in 24 hours.
